title: The Ancient Relic
description: A journey to recover a forgotten artifact from a sunken temple.

milestones.name: The Call to Adventure
milestones.description: Meeting the mysterious stranger who knows the relic's location.
milestones.completion_criteria: The player has agreed to search for the relic and has received a map or directions.

milestones.name: The Sunken Coast
milestones.description: Navigating the treacherous cliffs and arriving at the water's edge.
milestones.completion_criteria: The player has reached the entrance of the sunken temple.

milestones.name: The Heart of the Temple
milestones.description: Solving the ancient puzzles and facing the guardian.
milestones.completion_criteria: The player has defeated or bypassed the guardian and found the relic's chamber.

milestones.name: The Great Escape
milestones.description: Fleeing the collapsing temple with the relic in hand.
milestones.completion_criteria: The player has successfully escaped the temple with the relic.
